Description: Grant programmes sustainability. Sustainability is woven in various disciplines and is often linked to transport, chemistry, industrial and IT projects.

Title: Federal Financial Assistance Programs for Resilience Activities | Department of Energy
Description: 2 weeks ago - This interactive matrix compiled by the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) is a list of selected federal financial assistance programs that are available to assist state and local, tribal and territorial governments in natural hazard mitigation and energy resilience activities.2 · The funding information can be sorted by the following categories: The sponsoring federal organization · The type of financial assistance (e.g., grant, loan, or cooperative agreement) Eligible recipients (e.g., government entity, nonprofit, or for-profit corporation) Disaster declaration required.

Description: This Climate Adaptation Grant Application template is designed to help you submit a comprehensive, compelling proposal that demonstrates your understanding of climate risks...

Title: Funding Opportunity | U.S. Climate Resilience Toolkit
Description: A range of federal agencies and organizations commonly offer funding for climate adaptation or resilience-building projects. Check the external links below for opportunities that align with your needs.

Title: Community Resilience Centers - Strategic Growth Council
Description: SGC’s CRC program will fund new construction and upgrades of neighborhood-level resilience centers to provide shelter and resources during climate and other emergencies. The program will also fund year-round services and ongoing programming that build overall community resilience.

Title: Resilience Hubs Grant Program | PG&E
Description: Once developed, access to the hubs is year-round. The goal is to build and sustain community adaptive capacity in a trusted location. The program awarded $25,000 each to four Feasibility Projects. The grant funds an assessment of resilience hub needs and/or conceptual ideas for a resilience hub.
